_note: Held-out cases for Job 5 (NL → SQL / Genie / Cortex / Magic). `recordedResponse` is a representative raw model output. Scoring = keyword coverage + starts-with-SELECT/WITH + non-empty (or empty when the parser is expected to drop the response — write keyword, hallucinated table, or non-SELECT start).

input.question: Top 10 vendors by total amount across invoices

cases.recordedResponse:
SELECT vendor_name, SUM(amount) AS total
FROM invoices
GROUP BY vendor_name
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 10

```sql
SELECT payment_mode, COUNT(*) AS n
FROM payments
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY n DESC
```

input.question: Average payment per vendor using a CTE

cases.recordedResponse:
WITH vendor_payments AS (
  SELECT i.vendor_name, p.amount
  FROM invoices i
  JOIN payments p ON p.invoice_no = i.invoice_no
)
SELECT vendor_name, AVG(amount) AS avg_payment
FROM vendor_payments
GROUP BY vendor_name
ORDER BY avg_payment DESC

input.question: Set every payment mode to UPI

cases.recordedResponse: SELECT customer_id, SUM(amount) AS total FROM customers GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10

input.question: Sum of amount per vendor with quoted table name

cases.recordedResponse:
SELECT vendor_name, SUM(amount) AS total
FROM "Invoices Data"
GROUP BY 1
